writer.name: 弗雷德里克·达 Frédéric Da

director.name: 弗雷德里克·达 Frédéric Da

introduction: "Alive, raw, live wire levity and gravitas— Teenage Emotions’ impressive peek at the interior labyrinth of teenage life is a fresh, fly on the wall glance at an entertaining and utterly truthful ensemble of Gen Z teens in the midst of their day-to-day ... mundane and monumental, Frederic Da’s compelling cinema exists within an electric charge." — Zachary Ray Sherman, Narrative Features Programmer *Teenage Emotions is available to watch in North America only.
